arts.ttl: Former Chelsea star Ruud Gullit offers damning assessment of his former side - and points out similarity from when he was in charge nearly 30 years ago
arts.sum: Gullit took the Blues to FA Cup glory in 1997 as player manager - their first major trophy for 26 years - but was sacked the following season with the club second in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Triple Chelsea vs Tottenham early team news hint emerges as Cole Palmer decision made
arts.sum: A London derby between Chelsea and Tottenham will close out the first round of Premier League action after the international break. Given the time missed, both he and Jackson could start on the bench but it is very likely Palmer stars with Maresca's decision having been made.

arts.ttl: £42m price set: Man United ready to sanction risky transfer, Chelsea & two CL giants interested
arts.sum: Manchester United have reportedly set an asking price of just £42million for midfielder Kobbie Mainoo ahead of this summer’s transfer window. Chelsea are one of the big clubs showing an interest in Mainoo, but it seems the England international could also have exciting opportunities abroad. arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea battling Man City for £25m Frenchman, he just scored against one of Europes's best defences
Ange Postecoglou makes shock admission about potential Tottenham sack
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur's under-fire manager Ange Postecoglou bluntly and openly addressed the prospect of losing his job.

arts.ttl: Dean Huijsen release clause revealed amid Chelsea, Liverpool and Real Madrid transfer interest
arts.sum: Chelsea and Liverpool are reportedly at the forefront in the race to secure Bournemouth's star defender Dean Huijsen, with a hefty £50million release clause attached to his name. Huijsen's potential move to Madrid is seen as an easy fit, considering his upbringing in Marbella since he was five years old following his family's relocation there.

arts.ttl: Timo Werner and Andre Silva set to be sold by RB Leipzig in the summer
